phrases.intent_en: Ask if the cathedral is open to visitors right now
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que la cathédrale est ouverte aux visiteurs en ce moment ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh lah kah-tay-DRAL eh oo-VAIR oh vee-zee-TUR ahn suh moh-MAHN
phrases.cultural_note: The cathedral sometimes closes during religious services; check the schedule posted at the entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if it is possible to climb the Pey-Berland tower
phrases.text_local: Est-il possible de monter dans la tour Pey-Berland ?
phrases.pronunciation: eh-TEEL poh-SEEBL duh mohn-TAY dahn lah TOOR pay-bair-LAHN
phrases.cultural_note: The detached Pey-Berland bell tower next to the cathedral offers views over central Bordeaux and requires a separate ticket.

responses.english: Yes, the ticket office is across the way.
responses.phonetic: wee, luh ghee-SHEH eh ahn FAHSS
responses.french: Oui, le guichet est en face.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a leaflet about the history of the cathedral
phrases.text_local: Avez-vous un dépliant sur l'histoire de la cathédrale ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah-VAY-voo un day-PLEE-AHN soor lees-TWAHR duh lah kah-tay-DRAL
phrases.cultural_note: Eleanor of Aquitaine married Louis VII of France here in 1137.

responses.english: There are some at the entrance.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ahn ah ah lahn-TRAY
responses.french: Il y en a à l'entrée.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to light a candle
phrases.text_local: Où peut-on allumer un cierge, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo puh-TON ah-loo-MAY un SYAIR zhuh seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: Candles can usually be lit in a side chapel; a small donation is customary.

responses.english: On the right, at the back.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the opening hours of the tower
phrases.text_local: Quels sont les horaires d'ouverture de la tour ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel son lay oh-RAIR doo-VAIR-TYOOR duh lah TOOR
phrases.cultural_note: The Pey-Berland tower is managed by the Centre des monuments nationaux and has separate hours from the cathedral.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.
responses.phonetic: layz oh-REHR sohn ah-fee-SHAY ah lahn-TRAY
responses.french: Les horaires sont affichés à l'entrée.
